title: Weekly Market Report | Apr 27 – May 1, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+728 pts (+2.1%)** this week (35,420 → 36,148).

The average return across all 67 themes was **+3.2%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- Bank of Japan holds rates at 0.5%
- Position adjustments ahead of Golden Week
- US April ISM Manufacturing (52.3) improved
- Meta Q1 earnings: revenue +16%

---

## 📊 Theme Performance Rankings

### 🔥 Top 5 Rising Themes

**🥇 防衛・航空: +12.4%**
  → Major constituent stocks rallied.

**🥈 AI半導体: +8.7%**
  → AI and semiconductor capital inflows remain strong.

**🥉 半導体製造装置: +7.3%**
  → Major constituent stocks rallied.

**4️⃣ MLCC・電子部品: +5.9%**
  → AI and semiconductor capital inflows remain strong.

**5️⃣ 通信・光ファイバー: +5.1%**
  → Major constituent stocks rallied.

### ❄️ Bottom 5 Falling Themes

  → Profit-taking dominated.

**🥈 原子力・核融合: -2.8%**
  → Profit-taking dominated.

**🥉 仮想通貨・Web3: -2.3%**
  → Profit-taking dominated.

  → Profit-taking dominated.

  → Profit-taking dominated.
